title: The Story of the Fiend Prince EP1: Departure
overview: A human, Sheriff Rao, Fiend Prince Beelzebub, and Thief, a demon, search for the Legendary Spring.

title: The Story of the Fiend Prince EP2: The Royal Army's Secret
overview: The trio steals a Royal Army tank and winds up in a battle with a Royal Army airplane.

title: The Story of the Fiend Prince EP3: A Man Called Legend
overview: As Rao's tragic past is revealed, the trio begins to battle General Are and his Royal Army Tanks.

title: The Story of the Fiend Prince EP4: Beyond the Sandstorm
overview: When the Swimmers suddenly attack, Beelzebub gives chase and discovers something astonishing.

title: The Story of the Fiend Prince EP5: The Terrifying Insect Men
overview: The trio arrive at the King's water source and the final battle with Supreme Commander Zeu begins.

title: The Story of the Fiend Prince EP6: The Fiend Beelzebub
overview: An enraged Beelzebub overwhelms the Insect Men as Rao infiltrates the Army's mega aircraft carrier.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP1: On to a New Adventure
overview: The river flows once again in Sand Land, bringing with it new encounters and a new adventure.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP2: Operation: Sneak into the Capital!
overview: Upon learning of King Jam's imminent execution, the trio and their new friend rush to stop it.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP3: Fiend Power
overview: King Jam's execution is imminent once again when Supreme Commander Bred and Muniel corner Beelzebub.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP4: Muniel's Urn
overview: A hint from Lango leads the four to Demon Village where King Lucifer and Muniel square off.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP5: Flying Fortress Garam
overview: With the Flying Fortress Garam airborne once again, the four will do whatever it takes to stop it.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP6: The Final Battle!
overview: Beelzebub and Ann manage to get past Bred to stop Garam, only to come face-to-face with Muniel.

title: The Story of the Angel Hero EP7: The Battle Comes to an End
overview: The final battle, demon versus angel, comes to an end.
